title: Trump threatens to withdraw US troops from Italy and Spain – Europe live
summary_full: The US president said he would carry out of a review of US military presence in Europe after public criticism of the US-Israeli war on IranIn another “it’s an extended weekend everywhere but not in the UK” development, we have this crazy story about a missing Oscar statutette.The statuette belonging to Pavel Talankin, star and co-director of the Academy award-winning documentary Mr Nobody Against Putin, has disappeared after officials at New York’s John F Kennedy airport confiscated it before he boarded a flight, claiming it could be used as a weapon. Continue reading...
